loading.title: Verifying your email...
loading.desc: Please wait while we verify your email address.

success.title: Email Verified Successfully!
success.desc: Your email has been verified and you are now logged in.

errors.invalid_token: The verification link is invalid or malformed.
errors.verification_failed: Email verification failed. Please try again.
errors.already_verified: This email has already been verified.
errors.default: An error occurred during email verification.

resend.prompt: Would you like us to send you a new verification email?
resend.note: Note: If you don't receive the email, please try logging in again.

alreadyVerified.desc: Your email is already verified. You can now log in to your account.

userNotFound.desc: No account found with this email address. Please check your email or create a new account.

successToast.title: Email Verified Successfully
successToast.desc: Your email has been verified and you are now logged in.

errorToast.title: Email Verification Failed
errorToast.desc: Failed to verify your email. Please try again.

alreadyVerifiedToast.title: Email Already Verified
alreadyVerifiedToast.desc: Your email is already verified. Redirecting to dashboard...

noEmailToast.title: Error
noEmailToast.desc: No email address found. Please try logging in again or contact support.

resendSuccessToast.title: Verification Email Sent
resendSuccessToast.desc: A new verification email has been sent to your inbox.
